name: Ranger
description: Close-quarters specialist with a sword and shotgun. Excels at flanking and executing weakened enemies.

squaddieFreeAbility.name: Slash
squaddieFreeAbility.description: Melee sword strike against any enemy within movement range.

choices.name: Phantom
choices.description: Stay concealed when the rest of the squad is revealed.

choices.name: Blademaster
choices.description: +2 damage on all sword attacks.

choices.name: Shadowstrike
choices.description: +25 Aim and +25 Crit when attacking from concealment.

choices.name: Shadowstep
choices.description: Does not trigger overwatch or reaction fire.

choices.name: Conceal
choices.description: Re-enter concealment once per mission.

choices.name: Run and Gun
choices.description: Take an action after dashing. Cooldown.

choices.name: Implacable
choices.description: A kill on your turn grants a bonus move.

choices.name: Bladestorm
choices.description: Free sword attack on any enemy entering or attacking in melee range.

choices.name: Deep Cover
choices.description: Automatically hunker down if you didn't attack this turn.

choices.name: Untouchable
choices.description: After a kill on your turn, the next enemy attack against you misses.

choices.name: Reaper
choices.description: Chain melee kills; each kill refunds the action (with damage falloff).

choices.name: Rapid Fire
choices.description: Fire twice in a row at one target.

name: Sharpshooter
description: Long-range precision specialist. Can attack from extreme range and use pistol for close encounters.

squaddieFreeAbility.name: Squadsight
squaddieFreeAbility.description: Fire on any target a squadmate can see, within sniper line of sight.

choices.name: Long Watch
choices.description: Overwatch can trigger at Squadsight range.

choices.name: Return Fire
choices.description: Auto pistol shot back when targeted, once per turn.

choices.name: Deadeye
choices.description: High-damage shot at a reduced hit chance.

choices.name: Lightning Hands
choices.description: Free pistol shot that doesn't cost an action. Cooldown.

choices.name: Death From Above
choices.description: Sniper kills on lower elevation cost one action and don't end the turn.

choices.name: Quickdraw
choices.description: Firing the pistol as your first action doesn't end your turn.

choices.name: Kill Zone
choices.description: Reaction shots at every enemy that moves or fires within a cone. Cooldown.

choices.name: Faceoff
choices.description: Fire your pistol once at every visible enemy.

choices.name: Steady Hands
choices.description: +10 Aim and +10 Crit if you didn't move last turn.

choices.name: Aim
choices.description: Spend an action to sharply boost your next shot's accuracy.

choices.name: Serial
choices.description: Every sniper-rifle kill refunds all actions while active.

choices.name: Fan Fire
choices.description: Fire the pistol three times at a single target. Cooldown.

name: Grenadier
description: Heavy weapons specialist. Destroys cover and armor, controls areas with grenades and cannons.

squaddieFreeAbility.name: Launch Grenade
squaddieFreeAbility.description: Fire grenades from a launcher for extra range, plus a grenade-only slot.

choices.name: Blast Padding
choices.description: +1 Armor and reduced damage from explosives.

choices.name: Shredder
choices.description: Cannon attacks shred enemy armor.

choices.name: Demolition
choices.description: Volley that damages or destroys a target's cover. Cooldown.

choices.name: Suppression
choices.description: Pin a target: -50 Aim and reaction fire if it moves.

choices.name: Heavy Ordnance
choices.description: The grenade in your grenade slot gains a bonus use.

choices.name: Holo Targeting
choices.description: Cannon shots mark the target: +15 squad Aim against it.

choices.name: Volatile Mix
choices.description: +1 grenade radius and +2 grenade damage.

choices.name: Chain Shot
choices.description: Shot at -15 Aim; on a hit, fire a second shot. Cooldown.

choices.name: Salvo
choices.description: Launching grenades or heavy weapons as your first action doesn't end your turn.

choices.name: Hail of Bullets
choices.description: A guaranteed-hit shot that costs extra ammo. Cooldown.

choices.name: Saturation Fire
choices.description: Cone barrage hitting every enemy in an area and shredding cover. Cooldown.

choices.name: Rupture
choices.description: Critical shot that makes the target take +3 from all future damage.

name: Specialist
description: Tech support and combat medic. Controls the battlefield with a drone (Gremlin) for hacking and healing.

squaddieFreeAbility.name: Aid Protocol
squaddieFreeAbility.description: Send the Gremlin to grant an ally bonus defense (overwatch with Threat Assessment).

choices.name: Medical Protocol
choices.description: Gremlin heals or stabilizes an ally remotely; extra charge with a medikit.

choices.name: Combat Protocol
choices.description: Gremlin deals guaranteed damage to an enemy, more vs robotic.

choices.name: Revival Protocol
choices.description: Gremlin removes negative status effects from an ally.

choices.name: Haywire Protocol
choices.description: Hack robotic enemies to disable or seize control.

choices.name: Field Medic
choices.description: Equipped medikits gain 2 extra charges.

choices.name: Scanning Protocol
choices.description: Gremlin scans the area, boosting sight and revealing hidden enemies.

choices.name: Covering Fire
choices.description: Overwatch can trigger on any enemy action, not just movement.

choices.name: Threat Assessment
choices.description: Aid Protocol also grants the target covering-fire overwatch.

choices.name: Ever Vigilant
choices.description: Spending all actions on moves grants an automatic overwatch.

choices.name: Capacitor Discharge
choices.description: Gremlin AoE tech burst damaging all nearby enemies. Cooldown.

choices.name: Guardian
choices.description: Overwatch shots have a chance to grant an additional overwatch shot.

choices.name: Restoration
choices.description: Gremlin flies to each ally, healing or reviving as needed. Once per mission.

name: Psi Operative
description: Psychic warrior. Trained at the Psi Lab with unique random ability progression. Powerful but slow to develop.

choices.name: Stasis
choices.description: Encase an enemy or ally in a stasis field — immune to all damage but cannot act.

choices.name: Insanity
choices.description: Target an enemy — may Disorient, Panic, or briefly Mind Control them.

choices.name: Inspire
choices.description: Restore an ally's actions.

choices.name: Null Lance
choices.description: Fire a piercing psionic beam through multiple enemies.

choices.name: Void Rift
choices.description: Create a psionic disturbance that deals heavy damage and may Disorient all enemies in range.

choices.name: Solace
choices.description: Nearby allies are immune to mental effects.

choices.name: Soulfire
choices.description: Deal psionic damage to a target. Damage ignores armor.

choices.name: Domination
choices.description: Permanently mind control a non-robotic enemy.

choices.name: Fortress
choices.description: Passively resist psionic attacks and status effects.

choices.name: Sustain
choices.description: Passively, once per mission, survive a lethal hit with 1 HP instead.

name: SPARK
description: Robotic unit built from Shen's blueprints. Cannot be wounded in the traditional sense — takes repair time instead. Powerful melee and ranged capabilities.

choices.name: Repair
choices.description: SPARK can self-repair, restoring HP. Costs an action.

choices.name: Overdrive
choices.description: Gain +1 action this turn, but take 2 damage.

choices.name: Battle Comp
choices.description: +10 aim, +10 crit when not using Overdrive.

choices.name: Bulwark
choices.description: Adjacent allies gain +10 defense.

choices.name: Volatile
choices.description: Overdrive damage reduced; gain bonus to melee after using it.

choices.name: Integrated Systems
choices.description: All special abilities cost 1 less action.

choices.name: Wrecking Ball
choices.description: Move through destructible cover without spending extra movement.

choices.name: Sacrificial Protocol
choices.description: Take damage on behalf of an adjacent ally once per turn.

choices.name: Haywire Protocol
choices.description: Attempt to take control of a robotic enemy.

choices.name: Adaptive Aim
choices.description: +5 aim per consecutive shot at the same target.

choices.name: Bombard
choices.description: Fire a powerful salvo that damages all enemies in an area.

choices.name: Fortress Protocol
choices.description: Passively reduce incoming damage.

name: Reaper
description: Faction hero (WotC). Guerrilla scout who excels in concealment and solo flank play. Uses the Vektor rifle and claymores.

squaddieFreeAbility.name: Silent Killer
squaddieFreeAbility.description: Kills with the Vektor Rifle do not break concealment.

choices.name: Banish
choices.description: Fire multiple shots at a target; each hit after the first costs 1 ammo. Ends turn.

choices.name: Shadow
choices.description: Activate Shadow to enter a deep concealment state (once per mission).

choices.name: Claymore
choices.description: Plant a remote-detonated explosive that deals heavy damage.

choices.name: Distraction
choices.description: Toss a decoy device to draw enemy attention.

choices.name: Reaper's Mark
choices.description: Tag an enemy; kills on that enemy grant bonus XP and may not end concealment.

choices.name: Remote Start
choices.description: Detonate any explosive device from range as a free action.

choices.name: Bladestorm
choices.description: Automatically counter any enemy that moves adjacent.

choices.name: Ghost of War
choices.description: Reduce Reaper's visibility radius even further.

choices.name: Apex Ammo
choices.description: Banish shots also inflict Rupture.

choices.name: Kill Zone
choices.description: Take overwatch shots against all enemies in your aim cone.

choices.name: Death Dealer
choices.description: Banish costs 1 less ammo per shot.

choices.name: Phantom
choices.description: When the squad is revealed, this soldier remains concealed.

name: Skirmisher
description: Faction hero (WotC). Former ADVENT trooper. Highly mobile melee/ranged hybrid with a grapple hook. Gains extra actions from Justice and Wrath.

squaddieFreeAbility.name: Reckoning
squaddieFreeAbility.description: Melee attack that also pulls the target toward you.

choices.name: Justice
choices.description: Fire your grapple at a distant enemy, pulling them to you and stunning them.

choices.name: Wrath
choices.description: Propel yourself to an enemy and strike with a melee attack.

choices.name: Reflex
choices.description: Gain a free action at the start of your turn.

choices.name: Opportunist
choices.description: Reaction fire does not suffer the normal aim penalty.

choices.name: Combat Presence
choices.description: Once per turn, fire your weapon at an enemy who fires at one of your allies.

choices.name: Interrupt
choices.description: Set an interrupt to fire before an enemy acts.

choices.name: Battlelord
choices.description: Interrupt can trigger once per enemy turn.

choices.name: Threat Assessment
choices.description: Aid Protocol (requires Specialist bond) or bonus overwatch on ally.

choices.name: Whiplash
choices.description: Justice and Wrath abilities deal bonus damage.

choices.name: Marauder
choices.description: Kills grant a free move action.

choices.name: High-Strung
choices.description: Start each mission with Interrupt already set.

choices.name: Reaper
choices.description: Kills with the blade do not end the turn.

name: Templar
description: Faction hero (WotC). Psionic melee warrior who gains Focus from kills to unleash powerful attacks. No firearm — uses a psi-blade.

squaddieFreeAbility.name: Focus
squaddieFreeAbility.description: Gain Focus charges from kills and certain actions. Focus enhances other abilities.

choices.name: Volt
choices.description: Arc lightning between nearby enemies. Damage scales with Focus.

choices.name: Rend
choices.description: Powerful melee strike; damage scales with Focus.

choices.name: Reflect
choices.description: Chance to deflect a ranged attack back at the attacker.

choices.name: Parry
choices.description: Passively dodge the first melee attack each turn.

choices.name: Null Lance
choices.description: Fire a piercing psionic beam. Damage scales with Focus.

choices.name: Bladestorm
choices.description: Automatically counter adjacent enemies. Grants Focus on triggered attacks.

choices.name: Fortress
choices.description: Passively resist psionic and status effects.

choices.name: Rift
choices.description: Powerful area psionic explosion. Requires 3 Focus. Resets Focus to 0.

choices.name: Amplify
choices.description: Increase max Focus by 1.

choices.name: Ghost
choices.description: At max Focus, activate to create a phantom copy that fights alongside you.

choices.name: Arc Wave
choices.description: Send a wave of psionic energy along the ground, hitting all enemies in a line.

choices.name: Apotheosis
choices.description: Killing an enemy restores Focus faster and grants bonus HP temporarily.
